title: Cisco security advisory (AV26-646)
description: On July 1, 2026, Cisco published security advisories to address vulnerabilities in the following:
products: Cisco Catalyst Center Release 2.3.7  versions prior to 2.3.7.11-VA GSMU100
Cisco Catalyst Center Release 3.1 - versions prior to 3.1.6 GSMU200
Secure Endpoint Connector - multiple versions and platforms
solution: Review the references and apply the necessary updates.
